title: phillyrea angustifolia
intro: Phillyrea angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Mock Privet or Phillyrea, is a plant species within the family Oleaceae that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Phillyrea angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Phillyrea angustifolia have been used to make teas and infusions, which are brewed from the plant's leaves and flowers, and also used in the form of tinctures and essential oils.
